title: Yeahs Awards 2026 is now open for submissions, returning ...
full_text:
Yeastar's Post
Online status indicator
Active
Yeastar
June 3 at 4:00 AM ·
𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐡𝐬 𝐀𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐬 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔 is now open for submissions, returning with an expanded program that creates more ways to turn partner and customer success into visibility, growth, and scale.
𝐀𝐈 𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 | 𝐂𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐒𝐮𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐄𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞
Selected AI customer success cases will be awarded a 𝟓𝟎% discount on future AI projects.
𝐀𝐩𝐩 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐜𝐞 𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 | 𝐇𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐫
Hosting partners with notable technical innovations and integrations may be featured in the Yeastar App Marketplace.
𝐒𝐨𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐒𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔
Turn your success story into global LinkedIn exposure and official Yeastar amplification, powered by auto-generated campaign visuals and captions.
Your success deserves more than recognition. It deserves impact.
Submit your entry and learn more: https://hubs.ly/Q04jHFLJ0
#YeahsAwards26

Like
